vibe: Comforting, elegant, professional, trustworthy, aesthetic, warm

rules.h1: font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-semibold text-[#2B3A35]
rules.h2: font-heading text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-[#2B3A35]
rules.small: font-body text-sm font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-[#6B7F78]

components.buttons: Soft shadows, transform transition (hover:-translate-y-1, active:scale-95). Primary CTA is solid #5E8B7E with white text.
components.inputs: Light border (#E8E5DF), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#5E8B7E]/50, bg-white, large touch targets (h-12 or h-14).
components.cards: White surface, 3xl radius, soft shadow, hover states (slight lift and deeper shadow). Content inside MUST have p-6 minimum.
components.badges: Pill shaped, soft tinted background (e.g., bg-[#5E8B7E]/10 text-[#5E8B7E] for success, bg-[#E07A5F]/10 text-[#E07A5F] for priority).
components.chat_bubbles: User: bg-white text-main border border-[#E8E5DF]. AI: bg-[#5E8B7E]/10 text-[#2B3A35]. Both rounded-2xl.
components.animations: Use framer-motion. Staggered list reveals for Find Help cards. Gentle fade-up (y: 20 -> 0) for sections. Soft bouncing or pulsing for the logo and loading states.

icons.style: Stroke-based, friendly, use framer-motion to animate them on hover (e.g. slight rotation or scale).

logo_animated.description: Elegant CareConnect logo. Animate this with a gentle pulse effect using framer-motion.

hero_background.description: Soft abstract fluid wave background for the Home hero section.

cute_3d_icon.description: 3D medical/heart icon for empty states, chat welcome screen, or profile avatar.

organization_food.description: Image for Food Bank or Community Meal organization card.

organization_medical.description: Image for Mental Health or Medical Clinic organization card.

organization_donations.description: Image for Financial or Material Support organization card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' Google fonts. Add them via index.html or global css.
Extend Tailwind configuration with the custom colors, fonts, and shadows defined in this JSON.
Implement Framer Motion for ALL page transitions, layout reveals, and micro-interactions.
For the Find Help page, build beautiful rounded-3xl cards with the provided real images.
The Chat Assistant should feel friendly and therapeutic. Use the cute_3d_icon for the AI avatar and soft sage backgrounds for AI messages.
Dashboard should avoid typical boring SaaS look. Use generous padding, rounded-3xl widget containers, and soft shadow.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF for large backgrounds; strictly adhere to the warm off-white #FDFBF7.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use any placeholder image services. ONLY use the URLs provided in this JSON.
